upload.helper: Select a knowledge base and upload files

errors.fileTooLarge: Each file must be smaller than 5 MB
errors.unsupportedFile: Only md, pdf, txt, and docx files are supported

file.label: File
file.required: Please upload at least one file

dragger.hint: Only md, pdf, txt, and docx are supported. Each file must be smaller than 5 MB
dragger.text: Click or drag files to this area to upload

list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document?

detail.description: Document detail preview. You can view the content here and download the original file.
detail.notFound: The document does not exist or failed to load
detail.unsupportedPreview: Preview is not available for {{extension}} files

preview.docxEmpty: No DOCX content is available for preview
preview.pdfEmpty: No PDF content is available for preview

completed.hint: Indexing is complete. This document can be retrieved in searches.
completed.label: Completed

failed.hint: Indexing failed. This document will not appear in search results.
failed.label: Failed

indexing.hint: The document is being processed and may not be searchable yet.
indexing.label: Indexing

pending.hint: The document is stored and waiting to be indexed.
pending.label: Pending
